Container.Name: broccoli_norns-desktop
Container.Overview: norns on Docker for browser-based testing. Exposes maiden on 5000, norns screen at 8889, and audio stream at 8000/radio.mp3. Requires /dev/snd and realtime container permissions for audio. Supports configurable runtime UID/GID via PUID and PGID (default 99:100 matching standard Unraid nobody:users appdata ownership) so the container runs as the correct user without manual host permission changes. On startup, the wrapper remaps the `we` user to the configured PUID/PGID, initializes `/home/we/dust` (`code`, `data`, `audio`, `jackdrc`), verifies write access, and fails with a clear message if permissions are incorrect. If no Jackd Config Override file is mounted, startup automatically creates `/etc/jackdrc` with the dummy driver — no manual jackdrc setup required.
Container.ExtraParams: --entrypoint sh --tty --user root --cap-add=SYS_NICE --cap-add=SYS_PTRACE --security-opt seccomp=unconfined --ulimit rtprio=95 --ulimit memlock=-1 --shm-size=256m --device /dev/snd --group-add audio
Container.PostArgs: -lc "set -eu; PUID=${PUID:-99}; PGID=${PGID:-100}; case $PUID in *[!0-9]*|'') echo '[startup] ERROR: PUID must be a non-negative integer'; exit 1;; esac; case $PGID in *[!0-9]*|'') echo '[startup] ERROR: PGID must be a non-negative integer'; exit 1;; esac; echo '[startup] norns dust initialization starting'; echo '[startup] PUID='$PUID' PGID='$PGID; CUR_UID=$(id -u we); if [ $CUR_UID != $PUID ]; then usermod -u $PUID we; fi; CUR_GID=$(id -g we); if [ $CUR_GID != $PGID ]; then if cut -d: -f3 /etc/group | grep -qx $PGID; then usermod -g $PGID we; else groupmod -g $PGID $(id -gn we); fi; fi; mkdir -p /home/we/dust/code /home/we/dust/data /home/we/dust/audio /home/we/dust/jackdrc; chown -R $PUID:$PGID /home/we/dust; if ! su -s /bin/sh we -c 'test -w /home/we/dust && test -w /home/we/dust/code && test -w /home/we/dust/data && test -w /home/we/dust/audio && test -w /home/we/dust/jackdrc'; then echo '[startup] ERROR: /home/we/dust is not writable by user we. Fix host mount permissions and restart.'; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -s /etc/jackdrc ]; then echo '/usr/bin/jackd -R -P 95 -d dummy -p 1024' > /etc/jackdrc; echo '[startup] No jackdrc supplied; created default /etc/jackdrc with dummy driver. Set Jackd Config Override to use real audio hardware.'; fi; if [ -f /home/we/norns/lua/core/mods.lua ]; then perl -0pi -e 's/for\s+name,\s+details\s+in\s+pairs\(\s*scan\s*\)\s+do/for name, details in pairs(scan or {}) do/' /home/we/norns/lua/core/mods.lua; fi; if [ -f /home/we/norns/lua/core/startup.lua ]; then perl -0pi -e 's/mods\.load\(\s*mods\.scan\(\)\s*,\s*true\s*\)/mods.load(mods.scan() or {}, true)/' /home/we/norns/lua/core/startup.lua; fi; echo '[startup] norns dust initialization complete'; exec su -l -s /bin/sh -c 'exec tmuxp load norns' we"

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: Runtime UID for the 'we' user. Set to the owner UID of your Unraid appdata directory (99 for nobody on standard Unraid). Use 1000 if your appdata is owned by UID 1000.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Runtime GID for the 'we' user. Set to the owner GID of your Unraid appdata directory (100 for users on standard Unraid). Use 1000 if your appdata is owned by GID 1000.

Config.Name: Audio Stream Port
Config.Description: Container Port: 8000 - MP3 audio stream at /radio.mp3

Config.Name: Dust AppData
Config.Description: Persistent norns data/scripts. Startup creates code/data/audio/jackdrc and verifies write access for user we using the configured PUID/PGID.

Config.Name: Jackd Config Override
Config.Description: Optional host file bind-mounted over /etc/jackdrc. Leave blank to use the auto-created dummy driver default (/usr/bin/jackd -R -P 95 -d dummy -p 1024). Only set this if you have real audio hardware and want a custom ALSA jackd command. Create the host file first so Docker does not create a directory.
